h2a56bc49g899bg4ad6gb3c8ga4c702e2d242: It was you, wasn't it? You saved us. Thank you.
h74c1db16ge91cg4276ga6f9g08dbee959ef3: I haven't seen a single goblin. That's good, isn't it?
hbe2a367fg1e57g4c8eg8bd3g4b7928829b29: Glad you made it inside... doubt we'll be safe here for long though.
h976e394fge87dg4614g95b6g94ace7defe36: There'll be more coming. Goblins hunt in packs.
h2b9a675dgeb0fg470dgaeefg1195e450359d: You could hold off a horde of goblins from this position.
hbb455794g3437g45beg8f18g896f2108678e: Maybe - but we're not fighters. If they broke through, it'd be a massacre.
hfb001b15ge078g446fgaf92ga3bb9818c4ed: The sooner we leave for Baldur's Gate, the better.
h2f2ac8acgeebbg40f6g8c7fgc593f7731e3b: How far are we from the city?
hfdea8a50g0f6eg4a59g8557gf043399d0824: If the road was clear? A tenday's walk, maybe. But while the goblins are out there, it might as well be the other side of the world.
h85f6d100g8b59g4183g8927g47ccb5e42764: Why not take your chances on the road?
h329a78a9g45e1g41e3g846ag7be3a84d7835: We might have to. But I'd feel better if we at least knew how many are out there.
h3a707d88gf1b2g4be8g9715g50af1555a9eb: You're scared of a few goblins? Pathetic.
h1659ff52gbc72g41f8gafd5g6f6627e2ef2a: A few goblins? Felt like a lot more to me.
h8df34ccbgd976g4fe2ga471gd14c7c45cea6: So, yes. I'm scared. And I'm not ashamed of that.
h0c90e794g9cb1g4b9dgb2f7g28b81e5b61ae: If a few goblins scare you, you don't deserve to survive.
hfbf8bb15g9908g468ag95b6gfa215be8cf35: Let them come. This position favours the defender.
h573e20efg673fg490cga8f6g2d09c192202e: You think? That's something at least. We're not trained fighters though...
h710a8899g27dcg4c00gbaf9g4084a4a12a4a: Tactics are more important than training.
hfa936a84gcca4g4e40ga22eg7f1fe937ed81: I'm guessing you have plenty of both - be nice if I could say the same for myself.
hec707d65gfefag40cfg90d5g46712f265244: It'd be even nicer if we were on the road to Baldur's Gate already.
h2ad77f58g2e0cg4854gbe85g2084670ac409: I'm not really keen on fighting or praying.
h96939207g12d6g4e31ga8e9gabc481dc9bf6: Best get to digging your own graves then.
h66a313cegc0f0g4809g9fb2gdff22db295d2: 'Digging their graves'? Why not pass out daggers to stick themselves with, while you're at it?
hb1e80f3egcd52g4134gac95ga5f77220ddb7: Goblins aren't hunters - they're prey. I'll kill every last one.
ha9dac456g650dg48e2g94e5g6c42f607a721: We need an army, not a hunter. There could be hundreds of them out there.
ha4b15585ge194g4f1agaef0g2f5b1f0b0600: I will soon be kith'rak. I am an army.
hb22baa2dg9541g4d7ag969agfbfa3e7b58d8: There could be thousands. But they'd lose their nerve if we found the right weak spot.
haf73f0b6gd57ag47f5g9e61gdc49a789c46e: I've torn demons apart with my bare hands. Goblins won't be a problem.
hb6e4f11egbfe1g4eedgb8b3gd0ad4de2ad42: Hundreds? Urgh, it'll take hours to kill them all. She's right, we should just go.
h7d7c7196g57e1g4716g9656g8f86d3d4261f: | Doesn't matter how many there are. We'll handle it. We have to. |
h203655f3g4f6bg4e30g936cg9d9f98308df9: Never doubt the Blade of Frontiers. He will overcome, whatever the odds.
had637d64g10aeg40d0ga638gea20f2837c32: Don't worry too much. A handful of powerful spells go a long way.
h6c2714e9g5f09g4175ga848g01f94c2b263d: Still here? Thought you'd have abandoned us by now.
h3364ff4egaa62g462egbb8bgab1989fbfc43: If I see a goblin, I'm closing this gate - whether you're inside or not.
